ns0:entry.ns0:title: arthelokyo/astrowind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/arthelokyo/astrowind
Language: astro
⭕️ AstroWind: A free template using Astro v6 and Tailwind CSS v4. Astro starter theme.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitbonsai/mcpvault
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitbonsai/mcpvault
Language: astro
A lightweight Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for safe Obsidian vault access

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cworld1/astro-theme-pure
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cworld1/astro-theme-pure
Language: astro
⭐ A simple, fast and powerful blog & document theme built by Astro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lissy93/awesome-privacy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lissy93/awesome-privacy
Language: astro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: manuelernestog/astrofy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/manuelernestog/astrofy
Language: astro
Astrofy is a free and open-source template for your Personal Portfolio Website built with Astro and TailwindCSS. Create in minutes a website with Blog, CV, Project Section, Store and RSS Feed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: markhorn-dev/astro-nano
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/markhorn-dev/astro-nano
Language: astro
Astro Nano is a static, minimalist, lightweight, lightning fast portfolio and blog.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zeon-studio/astroplate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zeon-studio/astroplate
Language: astro
Astroplate is a free starter template built with Astro, TailwindCSS & TypeScript providing everything you need to jumpstart your Astro project. Get started with Astroplate and save yourself hours of work!
